page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 8 vCPUs. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a low memory-to-core ratio of 1.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the processor delivers weak single-core and multi-core performance, placing in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests. However, memory bandwidth tests for both cached and uncached reads and writes show average performance in the middle 50% tier. Cryptographic and extended instruction capabilities, evaluated via Passmark, also perform in the average tier, supported by hardware-level AVX-512 and AES instruction sets.

The primary tradeoff of this instance is its constrained memory capacity of 1.0 GB per vCPU, which limits its suitability for memory-intensive applications. Database operations and static web serving throughput both rank in the weak category. Consequently, this instance is best suited for compute-bound workloads with low memory footprints, basic network tasks, or lightweight utility services that can leverage the dedicated physical cores without requiring large memory allocations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 8.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:1 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and lacks local storage or GPU accelerators. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it provides a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core and multi-core CPU capabilities, placing in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench. However, memory bandwidth and Passmark encryption tests perform in the average tier, aided by AVX-512 and AES instruction sets. Due to the low memory allocation of 1.0 GB per core, this instance is constrained for memory-heavy applications. It is best suited for lightweight, compute-focused workloads with minimal memory requirements, basic utility processing, or dedicated core tasks that do not demand high memory density.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth. It is designed for low-memory compute workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth for low-memory compute workloads.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core x86_64 compute instance with a low memory-to-core ratio, designed for lightweight utility workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:1 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
No local storage and no GPU accelerators included
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Average memory bandwidth and encryption benchmark performance
Best suited for low-memory compute tasks and basic utility services
